title: satureja intricata subsp. castellana
intro: Satureja intricata subsp. castellana, also known as Castilian savory, is a subspecies of perennial herb within the mint family native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Satureja intricata subsp. castellana include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against cell damage, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Satureja intricata subsp. castellana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or added to food to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
